symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`minor` higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.33` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header.
root_cause: Severe algae and biological slime mats broke loose from distribution header piping and lodged inside target spray nozzles.
action_taken: Replaced 14 broken or missing distribution nozzles, removed heavy algae mats from hot water basin deck, and installed opaque UV-blocking basin covers.
parts_used: Polypropylene Target Spray Nozzles (15-Pack), Basin Cover Fasteners

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.28` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents.
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue over extended service.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe, and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade.
parts_used: Rotor Balancing Clip Set, External Cooling Fan

symptom_description: Scroll chiller locked out on false high discharge temperature alarm (`sensor reading 155°C` while actual pipe temp is `72°C`). Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on TOWER-302.
root_cause: Vibration chafing of sensor shielded wiring harness against chiller steel frame caused intermittent ground fault on sensor loop.
action_taken: Installed new return water temperature sensor assembly, cleaned microprocessor board edge connectors with contact cleaner, and tested staging.
parts_used: Water Temperature Sensor Assembly, Electronic Contact Cleaner Spray

symptom_description: Ops reported breaker handle stuck in middle/tripped position (`minor` resistance). Internal mechanism clicking but contacts will not latch closed. Unit overdrawing current when XFMR-401 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Contact welding or severe arcing erosion across primary moving contact pads following repeated high-current fault interruptions.
action_taken: Replaced complete draw-out air circuit breaker (`ACB`) assembly, renewed bus terminal stabs, and verified all protection settings against engineering coordination study.
parts_used: Replacement Molded Case Circuit Breaker (MCCB 400A), Busbar Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Purge unit running excessively (`> 45 minutes per hour` exhausting non-condensables). Tech noted significant oil film near rupture disc flange.
root_cause: Degraded elastomeric O-ring seal on condenser relief/rupture disc flange assembly allowing gradual low-pressure refrigerant seepage.
action_taken: Performed thorough leak search using heated diode detector, located leak at rupture disc flange, recovered charge, replaced rupture disc and O-ring gasket, evacuated to 300 microns, and re-trimmed R-134a charge.
parts_used: Centrifugal Compressor Shaft Seal Assembly, Oil Filter Element, R-134a (65 lbs)

symptom_description: Intermittent flame failure lockouts during high-to-low fire modulation transitions. Tech observed high yellow, smoky flame instead of tight blue pattern.
root_cause: Gas pressure regulator diaphragm drift caused improper air-to-fuel ratio (`excessively rich mixture`) leading to flame instability and high CO.
action_taken: Replaced defective UV flame scanner head and ignition electrode assembly, tightened and recalibrated air/fuel modulating linkage arms, and set combustion profile using digital flue gas analyzer.
parts_used: UV Flame Scanner Sensor Head, Ignition Electrode & Porcelain Assembly, High-Voltage Ignition Wire

symptom_description: Control panel showing earth fault. Inspection of power cable drop revealed high cuts and exposed copper armor.
root_cause: Accidental pinch damage during previous pump lifting and lowering operation along guide rails.
action_taken: Renewed power cable assembly, installed rubber guide rail chafing protectors, and re-torqued strain relief clamp.
parts_used: Submersible Power Drop Cable Assembly, Terminal Gland O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Scroll compressor amp draw fluctuating erratically (`173` Amps). Chiller failing to pull down process loop temperature (`drastic` deficit). Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to TOWER-302.
root_cause: Prolonged operation with marginal oil return caused metal-to-metal scoring between orbiting and fixed scroll wraps.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant circuit B, cut out worn scroll compressor, brazed in exact replacement scroll compressor assembly, replaced liquid line drier, evacuated to 400 microns, and weighed in R-410A charge.
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Replacement Assembly, Suction Accumulator Vessel, Filter Drier Element, R-410A (28 lbs)

symptom_description: Found heavy fluid dripping constantly from pump stuffing box area. Pool of process fluid accumulating on baseplate. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to MOTOR-102.
root_cause: Shaft runout exceeding 0.003 inches caused uneven wear on mechanical seal stationary face.
action_taken: Removed pump casing, replaced cartridge mechanical seal assembly, and flushed seal supply piping.
parts_used: Mechanical Seal Repair Kit, Viton O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Flame safeguard controller (`FSG`) locked out on primary flame failure during ignition sequence. Burner blower motor running but zero flame establishment.
root_cause: Ignition electrode spark gap misaligned or porcelain insulator cracked, preventing reliable high-voltage pilot ignition arc.
action_taken: Cleaned UV flame scanner lens with alcohol swab, adjusted ignition electrode spark gap to 1/8 inch, verified pilot flame signal strength (`3.5V DC`), and checked complete firing sequence.
parts_used: Flame Scanner Replacement Unit, Ignition Transformer 10kV, Linkage Ball Joints (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Excessive recirculation noise inside casing and severe pressure drop across pump discharge flange.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past 12 months eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances.
action_taken: Swapped out worn impeller assembly and renewed shaft locking nut and key.
parts_used: Replacement Impeller, Lock Washer, Shaft Nut

symptom_description: Air discharge temp steadily climbing over past 48 hours, reaching `83`°C during peak shift demands.
root_cause: Thermal bypass valve failed in closed position, preventing hot oil from circulating through external cooler core.
action_taken: Pressure washed air/oil cooler radiator exterior fins with biodegradable degreaser and blown dry with low-pressure air.
parts_used: Cabinet Ventilation Filter Pad, Oil Top-off Bottle

symptom_description: Main molded case circuit breaker (`MCCB`) failed to trip during downstream short circuit event, causing upstream feeder breaker to clear fault.
root_cause: Electronic trip unit (`ETU`) microprocessor failure caused by voltage surge transients on control power feed.
action_taken: Swapped out jammed circuit breaker assembly, installed new shunt trip accessory coil, torqued busbar connections to 275 in-lbs, and performed insulation resistance test.
parts_used: Electronic Trip Unit Module (ETU Rebuild Kit), Synthetic Breaker Lubricating Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Strong heavy smell of burnt varnish from motor cooling fan shroud. Megger test reads `0.1` Mega-ohms between Phase A and ground.
root_cause: Age-related thermal brittleness of Class F winding insulation accelerated by frequent motor start/stop cycles.
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement, renewed lead lugs, and verified balance and alignment with driven load.
parts_used: Stator Rewind Kit, VFD Output Line Reactor, Terminal Gasket

symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker. Motor frame burning hot (`117`°C) with `severe` smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Phase loss on 460V incoming feed caused single-phasing thermal burnout of cooling tower induction motor windings.
action_taken: Removed failed cooling tower fan motor using crane, installed severe-duty TEFC replacement motor, renewed shaft alignment, and sealed terminal box with RTV.
parts_used: Severe-Duty TEFC Cooling Tower Motor 25HP, Composite Coupling Element, RTV Silicone Sealant

symptom_description: Conveyor belt mistracking severely (`extreme` off-center toward right side). Belt edge rubbing against steel conveyor frame (`cavitation crackling` squealing sound and rubber dust).
root_cause: Splice joint cut and joined at a slight diagonal angle (`improper squareness during belt lacing/vulcanizing`), causing rhythmic mistracking every belt revolution.
action_taken: Re-squared conveyor structural frame, replaced 4 jammed return idler rollers, adjusted head and tail pulley parallelism using laser square, and fine-tuned tracking.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Return Training Roller Assembly (2-Pack), Take-up Bearing Adjusting Bolt Kit

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from transformer tank. Infrared scan showed `moderate` localized heating around LV bushing terminations (`115°C`).
root_cause: External radiator fins heavily clogged with airborne cottonwood fluff, dust, and industrial dirt, reducing convective heat rejection by `> 50%`.
action_taken: Replaced defective cooling fan bank contactor and thermal overload relays, pressure washed radiator fins with low-pressure water, and verified all 6 cooling fans operational.
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assemblies (Set of 2), Fan Control Thermostat Switch, Radiator Fin Cleaner

symptom_description: Phase current imbalance exceeding `22%` (`159` Amps Phase A vs normal Phase B/C). Motor running extremely rough. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from PUMP-102.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor during peak production periods caused sustained overheating of winding copper.
action_taken: Removed motor from base plate, transported to electrical rebuild facility for complete Class H stator rewind and VPI dip.
parts_used: Complete Replacement Induction Motor 50HP, Coupling Key

symptom_description: Loud severe screeching, grinding, and buzzing/humming sound emanating from carry-side troughing idler roller near Station 14. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on MOTOR-602.
root_cause: Material spillage burying return idlers completely, preventing rotation and causing bearings to overheat and lock up.
action_taken: Swapped out 8 worn troughing and return rollers across Section B, upgraded loading zone to heavy-duty rubber-disc impact idlers, and aligned brackets.
parts_used: CEMA C Troughing Idler Rollers 35-Degree (Set of 6), Return Idler Rollers 4-inch (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Tech noted distinct grease discoloration leaking from bearing grease relief tube and metallic clattering.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat and blown grease retainer seals.
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing with `concerning` harmonics. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on CNV-602.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat and blown grease retainer seals.
action_taken: De-coupled motor, removed bearing end shields, replaced both DE and NDE bearings with C3 clearance ball bearings, and packed with Polyrex EM.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Compressor oil filter bypass indicator tripped red. Tech observed `concerning` oil varnish buildup inside reservoir sampling port.
root_cause: Failure of thermostatic bypass valve caused oil to run continuously chilled, allowing condensate moisture to emulsify with oil.
action_taken: Drained contaminated fluid, replaced thermostatic mixing valve element, renewed filters, and filled with certified compressor lubricant.
parts_used: Complete Maintenance Filter & Oil Kit (Separator, Oil Filter, Air Filter, Oil)

symptom_description: Hermetic compressor making severe unusual internal clattering buzzing/humming. Suction and discharge pressures equalized while running.
root_cause: Single-phasing or severe voltage dip on incoming feed damaged hermetic compressor start winding.
action_taken: Replaced start and run capacitors along with potential relay; tested hermetic compressor windings (`resistance OK`) and successfully restarted unit.
parts_used: Replacement Hermetic Refrigeration Compressor Assembly, Bi-Flow Filter Drier, R-134a Charge (6 lbs)

symptom_description: Water sight level glass on moisture separator bowl completely full of liquid. Electronic drain solenoid clicking but no water discharging.
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve, cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring

symptom_description: Phase current imbalance exceeding `22%` (`154` Amps Phase A vs normal Phase B/C). Motor running extremely rough.
root_cause: Contamination of stator coils with airborne conductive dust and moisture due to missing terminal box gasket.
action_taken: Swapped out failed motor with certified warehouse spare unit; sent damaged stator for rewind and core loss testing.
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set

symptom_description: High torque alarm active on conveyor drive controller. Motor frame temperature `99`°C (`marked` overheating). Conveyor struggling to start under load.
root_cause: Tail pulley or take-up assembly jammed with packed solid material, creating immense frictional drag against belt movement.
action_taken: Cleared mechanical jam inside head pulley discharge chute, re-torqued motor terminal connections, checked gearbox oil level, and verified VFD current stability across full speed range.
parts_used: Thermal Overload Relay Element, Take-up Slide Lubricant (1 Can), Troughing Idler Rollers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Noticeable significant crackling and popping sounds heard from pump suction casing. Discharge pressure is drastic erratic under normal load.
root_cause: Operating pump excessively far out beyond its Best Efficiency Point (BEP) during high production demand.
action_taken: Cleaned suction inlet basket strainer and throttled discharge valve to restore adequate NPSH margin.
parts_used: Flange Gasket 3-inch, Stainless Steel Bolt Set

symptom_description: Main molded case circuit breaker (`MCCB`) failed to trip during downstream short circuit event, causing upstream feeder breaker to clear fault.
root_cause: Shunt trip coil burnout (`open circuit`) preventing remote safety interlock system from opening breaker.
action_taken: Replaced complete draw-out air circuit breaker (`ACB`) assembly, renewed bus terminal stabs, and verified all protection settings against engineering coordination study.
parts_used: Replacement Molded Case Circuit Breaker (MCCB 400A), Busbar Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing with `sharp` harmonics.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set, cleaned grease cavities, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly.
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Belt edge torn and fraying (`slight` internal fabric carcass cords exposed and catching on conveyor frame brackets). Inspected power and control interconnects running to MOTOR-601 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Skirt board sealing rubber improperly adjusted (`steel backing clamp dropped down`), cutting into moving belt cover like a chisel.
action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Hot Vulcanizing Splice Kit & Gum Rubber, Primary Belt Cleaner Scraper Blade, Urethane Skirt Strip

symptom_description: Loud intermittent buzzing and arcing sound (`high-pitched squealing`) heard inside distribution panel enclosure. Localized persistent discoloration on bus connection bolts. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on XFMR-401.
root_cause: Thermal expansion and contraction cycles over years of fluctuating load current caused gradual loosening of bolted busbar and cable lug mechanical terminations.
action_taken: Cleaned arced busbar contact surfaces, installed new silver-plated copper splice plates and high-tensile hardware with Belleville washers, and verified micro-ohm contact resistance (`< 15 micro-ohms`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Copper Compression Lugs (Set of 3), Belleville Spring Washers & Grade 8 Bolts, Conductive Electrical Joint Compound (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Routine secondary injection testing revealed feeder breaker long-time and short-time trip units failed to actuate within specified curve (`> 500%` time delay). Ops reported load fluctuations on XFMR-401 coinciding with this fault.
root_cause: Contact welding or severe arcing erosion across primary moving contact pads following repeated high-current fault interruptions.
action_taken: Replaced complete draw-out air circuit breaker (`ACB`) assembly, renewed bus terminal stabs, and verified all protection settings against engineering coordination study.
parts_used: Replacement Molded Case Circuit Breaker (MCCB 400A), Busbar Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Thermal warning alarm active on compressor controller. Unit operating at `67` Amps with gradual heat buildup inside acoustic enclosure.
root_cause: Thermal bypass valve failed in closed position, preventing hot oil from circulating through external cooler core.
action_taken: Circulated chemical descaling/de-varnishing agent through internal cooler passages, flushed system, and replaced oil filter.
parts_used: Cabinet Ventilation Filter Pad, Oil Top-off Bottle

symptom_description: Loud persistent whining and thumping sound emanating from motor non-drive end bearing during operation. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to PUMP-102.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings after exceeding 40,000 hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Belt edge torn and fraying (`extreme` internal fabric carcass cords exposed and catching on conveyor frame brackets).
root_cause: Severe impact from oversized frozen boulders dropped from 8-foot height at transfer point exceeded belt carcass puncture resistance.
action_taken: Repaired puncture and edge tear using cold vulcanizing patch kit, ground smooth, replaced damaged belt cleaner blade, and verified 3/8-inch skirt board clearance.
parts_used: Conveyor Belt Replacement Section (3-ply, 12ft), Flexco Bolt Solid Plate Fasteners (Box of 25), Skirt Clamps

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `94`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `145°C` alarm limit.
root_cause: External cooling fan cover grid clogged with lint and debris, blocking cooling airflow across motor frame.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: None

symptom_description: Cooling tower basin water temperature rising above `32°C` alarm setpoint (`drastic` spike). Fan motor stationary (`0 Amps` draw).
root_cause: Severe bearing seizure due to water wash-out of grease in vertical fan motor lower bearing during heavy monsoon/spray conditions.
action_taken: Swapped out burned cooling tower fan motor with spare severe-duty VFD-rated motor, replaced flexible shaft coupling, and verified fan pitch balance.
parts_used: Severe-Duty Fan Motor 30HP, Shaft Coupling Kit, Waterproof Conduit Gland Set

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor hot to touch (`77`°C) and tripping on low suction pressure cutoff during afternoon shift.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge over past 6 months.
action_taken: Recovered remaining refrigerant charge, repaired cracked capillary tube brazed joint with 15% silver solder, evacuated to 500 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-134a.
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

symptom_description: Pump making loud cavitation crackling right after morning startup. Discharge flow dropping intermittently with high casing vibration.
root_cause: Operating pump excessively far out beyond its Best Efficiency Point (BEP) during high production demand.
action_taken: Cleaned suction inlet basket strainer and throttled discharge valve to restore adequate NPSH margin.
parts_used: Suction Strainer Mesh Basket, Flange Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Submersible pump seal chamber leak detector alarm active. Small pressure drop noticed during pull test.
root_cause: Corrosion of lower seal housing lip due to aggressive wastewater chemistry.
action_taken: Replaced lower silicon carbide seal faces and upper lip seal; flushed and refilled barrier fluid reservoir.
parts_used: Double Mechanical Seal Assembly, Seal Chamber Gasket Set

symptom_description: Relief valve popped off prematurely at `30` PSI during normal operation (`nameplate setpoint 150 PSI`). Valve fails to reseat tightly after blowing down.
root_cause: Corrosion, scale, and boiler alkalinity carryover particles lodged between safety valve disc and stainless steel nozzle seat after previous simmer event.
action_taken: Swapped out defective safety valve with NBBI certified replacement assembly, renewed flange gaskets and high-tensile studs, and documented ASME pop test during firing startup.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`moderate`) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: High oil temperature alarm (`91`°C) and `sharp` drop in differential oil pressure across centrifugal compressor thrust bearing. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from TOWER-301.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of journal and thrust hydrodynamic babbitt bearings after 35,000 hours of high-speed centrifugal duty.
action_taken: Disassembled compressor drive end, installed new precision babbitt bearing set, calibrated oil pressure regulating valve, and performed full oil flush.
parts_used: Centrifugal Bearing Rebuild Kit (Journal & Thrust), Oil Sump Gasket Set, POE Oil Charge (8 Gal)

symptom_description: High air discharge temperature trip (`116`°C) shut down compressor package. Oil cooler radiator feels severe hot across all passes.
root_cause: Low oil level in compressor sump due to gradual carryover past aging separator element.
action_taken: Pressure washed air/oil cooler radiator exterior fins with biodegradable degreaser and blown dry with low-pressure air.
parts_used: Thermostatic Oil Bypass Valve Kit, Compressor Oil (1 Gal), O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker. Motor frame burning hot (`92`°C) with `concerning` smoke from terminal box. Also inspected CHILL-301 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Moisture and corrosive cooling tower mist penetrated motor terminal enclosure, causing insulation breakdown across stator leads.
action_taken: Installed new vertical fan drive motor, renewed motor shaft seal and rain canopy, greased bearings with waterproof grease, and tested VFD speed steps.
parts_used: Inverter-Duty Fan Motor Assembly, Lower Bearing Waterproof Lip Seal, Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Ops noted chiller struggling to maintain `7°C` chilled water setpoint (`sharp` deficit) during afternoon peak load due to high head pressure.
root_cause: Bio-fouling and algae growth inside condenser tubes forming insulating biofilm layer after chemical biocide dosing pump failure.
action_taken: Performed full mechanical tube brushing of condenser and evaporator tube sheets, flushed bundles with clean water, and calibrated automatic water treatment controller.
parts_used: Water Box End Cover Gaskets, Nylon Replacement Tube Brushes (10-Pack)

symptom_description: Ops noted pump running smoothly but failing to meet process target gpm. Hydraulic performance curve shift suspected.
root_cause: Chemical corrosion thinned outer shroud of bronze impeller, leading to internal recirculation.
action_taken: Replaced eroded impeller assembly, renewed front/rear wear rings, and balanced rotor assembly dynamically.
parts_used: Impeller Assembly, Front and Rear Wear Rings, Casing Gasket

symptom_description: Drive belts show excessive side wear, fraying cords, and glazing across pulley contact surfaces. Tension significantly degraded. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on DRYER-202.
root_cause: Improper initial belt tensioning (`too loose`) allowed slippage and frictional glazing during high torque starts.
action_taken: Cleaned oil mist off sheave grooves using solvent, installed new matched V-belt set, and adjusted motor slide base tension.
parts_used: Heavy Duty V-Belt Set (3-Pack), Solvent Cleaner (1 Can)

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight of scale deposits.
root_cause: Failure of chemical scale inhibitor/dispersant dosing pump allowed calcium carbonate hardness to exceed saturation index.
action_taken: Circulated bio-dispersant and mild descaling agent through tower loop for 12 hours, flushed cold water basin, and serviced bleed-off solenoid.
parts_used: Distribution Nozzle Replacement Set (20-Pack), Conductivity Controller Probe, Chemical Pump Peristaltic Tubing

symptom_description: Transformer emitting severe buzzing/crackling sound inside tank (`0.20` in/sec RMS on shell). Ultrasonic acoustic survey detected partial discharge near HV winding. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from PANEL-402.
root_cause: Long-term thermal degradation and chemical depolymerization of Kraft paper winding insulation caused by operating at sustained high load temperatures (`> 90°C`).
action_taken: Performed on-site vacuum oil processing and Fuller's earth reclamation to remove polar compounds and acids, dried winding cellulose, and re-tested power factor (`Tan-Delta < 0.4%`).
parts_used: Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (50 Gal), Transformer Breather Assembly, Antioxidant Oil Additive Package

symptom_description: Oil dripping steadily (`3-5 drops per min`) from top cover bushing turret gasket area. Transformer tank exterior coated in excessive dust and oil.
root_cause: Degraded O-ring seal on no-load tap changer shaft assembly allowing slow weepage of insulating mineral oil under static head pressure.
action_taken: Isolated transformer, replaced degraded bushing turret gaskets and radiator flange gaskets using nitrile cork sheets, vacuum treated and topped off dielectric oil.
parts_used: Bushing Turret Gasket Set, Radiator Flange O-Rings (Pack of 8), Dielectric Transformer Oil (25 Gallons)

symptom_description: Pilot ignition spark clicking (`hissing`) but main gas valve fails to open. Flame scanner signal strength reading `moderate` weak (`< 1.2 Volts DC`).
root_cause: UV flame scanner lens heavily fouled with soot and oil film, causing weak flame signal that dropped below holding threshold of safety relay.
action_taken: Replaced defective UV flame scanner head and ignition electrode assembly, tightened and recalibrated air/fuel modulating linkage arms, and set combustion profile using digital flue gas analyzer.
parts_used: Flame Scanner Replacement Unit, Ignition Transformer 10kV, Linkage Ball Joints (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Transformer tripping on top-stage oil temperature relay during peak afternoon ambient temperature (`minor` above design).
root_cause: Cooling fan bank contactor failure and tripped motor circuit breakers prevented forced-air cooling (`FA stage`) from engaging during heavy load.
action_taken: Replaced defective cooling fan bank contactor and thermal overload relays, pressure washed radiator fins with low-pressure water, and verified all 6 cooling fans operational.
parts_used: Fan Bank Control Relay, Cooling Fan Motor 460V, Type II Dielectric Oil (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Thermal inspection (`IR gun`) showed seized return idler bearing reaching `118`°C. Sparks visible (`drastic` hazard) under dark operating conditions. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit MOTOR-602.
root_cause: Water and abrasive bulk particulate grit penetrated idler labyrinth seals during high-pressure washdowns, causing bearing grease washout and seizure.
action_taken: Locked out conveyor, removed 6 seized and noisy troughing idler assemblies along carry span, and installed new sealed-for-life CEMA C heavy-duty idler rollers.
parts_used: CEMA C Troughing Idler Rollers 35-Degree (Set of 6), Return Idler Rollers 4-inch (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Motor tripped main overload and instantaneous ground fault protection. Stator shows `86`°C localized hotspot on IR scan.
root_cause: Contamination of stator coils with airborne conductive dust and moisture due to missing terminal box gasket.
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement, renewed lead lugs, and verified balance and alignment with driven load.
parts_used: Stator Rewind Kit, VFD Output Line Reactor, Terminal Gasket

symptom_description: Boiler making high popping and kettling sounds (`thumping`) from waterside during high fire operation. Bottom blowdown discharging slight heavy scale chips.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Performed chemical boil-out using alkaline/polymer descaling compound, flushed waterside thoroughly, replaced low-water cutoff float bowl assembly, and established rigorous daily blowdown schedule.
parts_used: Inhibited Sulfamic Acid Boiler Descaler (30 Gallons), Neutralizing Compound (10 lbs), Handhole & Manway Gasket Set (Pack of 12)

symptom_description: Oil sight glass shows abnormal dark, foamy oil with heavy sludge formation. Compressor running `116`°C above normal discharge temp.
root_cause: Failure of thermostatic bypass valve caused oil to run continuously chilled, allowing condensate moisture to emulsify with oil.
action_taken: Drained degraded compressor oil, flushed oil sump with cleaning solvent, replaced air/oil separator and oil filter, and refilled with synthetic ISO VG 46 oil.
parts_used: Thermostatic Bypass Valve Element, Oil Filter Assembly, Separator Element, ISO VG 46 Lube

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `slight` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `101`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `145°C` alarm limit.
root_cause: Voltage unbalance of `3.8%` across supply lines caused `35%` increase in localized rotor/stator heating.
action_taken: Cleared blockage from cooling fan intake grid, washed frame fins, and verified balanced supply voltage (`460V` +/- 1%).
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Oil dripping steadily (`3-5 drops per min`) from top cover bushing turret gasket area. Transformer tank exterior coated in intermittent dust and oil. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on PANEL-401.
root_cause: Age-related hardening, shrinkage, and compression set of nitrile rubber gaskets on main tank cover and bushing flanges after 15 years of outdoor exposure.
action_taken: Isolated transformer, replaced degraded bushing turret gaskets and radiator flange gaskets using nitrile cork sheets, vacuum treated and topped off dielectric oil.
parts_used: Nitrile-Cork Transformer Gasket Sheet Kit, Type II Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (15 Gallons), Flange Bolt Set

symptom_description: Power factor / Tan-Delta test on transformer windings increased to `1.8%` (`normal < 0.5%`). Furan analysis indicates severe Kraft paper insulation aging (`DP < 250`).
root_cause: Transient overvoltages from switching surges and lightning strikes caused micro-perforations and partial discharge inside inter-turn paper insulation.
action_taken: Performed on-site vacuum oil processing and Fuller's earth reclamation to remove polar compounds and acids, dried winding cellulose, and re-tested power factor (`Tan-Delta < 0.4%`).
parts_used: Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (50 Gal), Transformer Breather Assembly, Antioxidant Oil Additive Package

symptom_description: Loud gradual buzzing and arcing sound (`thumping`) heard inside distribution panel enclosure. Localized significant discoloration on bus connection bolts.
root_cause: Improper initial torque application during installation (`bolts tightened without calibrated torque wrench or Belleville spring washers`).
action_taken: Cleaned arced busbar contact surfaces, installed new silver-plated copper splice plates and high-tensile hardware with Belleville washers, and verified micro-ohm contact resistance (`< 15 micro-ohms`).
parts_used: None

symptom_description: Pump making loud grinding right after morning startup. Discharge flow dropping intermittently with high casing vibration.
root_cause: Operating pump excessively far out beyond its Best Efficiency Point (BEP) during high production demand.
action_taken: Flushed suction piping line with high-pressure water and inspected impeller eye for early pitting signs.
parts_used: Suction Valve Packing Rings, O-Ring Kit

symptom_description: Top oil temperature gauge reading `110`°C (`high alarm setpoint 85°C`). Winding hot-spot temperature indicator reaching `102°C` under `85%` load.
root_cause: Low dielectric oil level in main tank prevented natural circulation (`ONAN`) of hot oil through top radiator headers.
action_taken: Topped off dielectric oil level to normal operating mark, cleaned radiator fin passages, and replaced loose LV bushing internal terminal palm connections.
parts_used: Cooling Fan Contactor 3-Pole 240V, Thermal Overload Relay, Cooling Fan Motor 1/2 HP TEAO

symptom_description: Oil dripping steadily (`3-5 drops per min`) from top cover bushing turret gasket area. Transformer tank exterior coated in intermittent dust and oil.
root_cause: Degraded O-ring seal on no-load tap changer shaft assembly allowing slow weepage of insulating mineral oil under static head pressure.
action_taken: Repaired leaking radiator weld seam using approved epoxy/brazing procedure, replaced tap changer O-ring seal, and refilled transformer with certified Type II dielectric mineral oil.
parts_used: Bushing Turret Gasket Set, Radiator Flange O-Rings (Pack of 8), Dielectric Transformer Oil (25 Gallons)

symptom_description: Safety relief valve leaking intermittent live steam (`screeching` hissing) across seat during standby pressure. Valve body running extremely hot (`118`°C).
root_cause: Corrosion, scale, and boiler alkalinity carryover particles lodged between safety valve disc and stainless steel nozzle seat after previous simmer event.
action_taken: Replaced primary and secondary steam safety relief valves with calibrated code-stamped spares, adjusted vent piping expansion slip joint to eliminate mechanical strain, and tested pop pressure.
parts_used: ASME Section I Code-Stamped Safety Relief Valve (1.5x2.5 inch, 150 PSI), Spiral Wound Flange Gasket 1.5-inch, High-Temp Stud Bolt Set

symptom_description: Phase A terminal lug glowing red under peak shift current (`69` Amps). Thermal imaging shows `112°C` temperature at cable-to-bus bolted joint. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from XFMR-402.
root_cause: Galvanic corrosion and oxidation between dissimilar metals (`copper cable to aluminum bus lug`) causing high joint contact resistance.
action_taken: Cleaned arced busbar contact surfaces, installed new silver-plated copper splice plates and high-tensile hardware with Belleville washers, and verified micro-ohm contact resistance (`< 15 micro-ohms`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Copper Compression Lugs (Set of 3), Belleville Spring Washers & Grade 8 Bolts, Conductive Electrical Joint Compound (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Gradual degradation in discharge flow (`drastic` reduction). Casing inspection revealed distinct internal turbulence and grinding. Note: Vibration and harmonic resonance appear transmitted from MOTOR-101.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates over extended runtime.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller and casing wear rings.
parts_used: Replacement Impeller, Lock Washer, Shaft Nut

symptom_description: Loud intermittent tracking and crackling sound heard along red/glastic standoff insulators supporting main copper bus (`0.45` vibration).
root_cause: Transient overvoltage strike exceeded dielectric breakdown limit of degraded busbar shrink-tubing insulation.
action_taken: Isolated main feed, cleaned soot and carbon tracking from panel interior using dielectric solvent, replaced all 6 Glastic busbar support standoff insulators, and performed 1000V Megger test (`reading > 500 Mega-ohms`).
parts_used: Replacement Standoff Insulators (Pack of 8), Phase Barrier Kit, Industrial Contact & Cabinet Cleaner

symptom_description: Air discharge temp steadily climbing over past 48 hours, reaching `86`°C during peak shift demands.
root_cause: Internal oil cooler passages partially plugged with oil varnish deposits, reducing heat transfer efficiency.
action_taken: Circulated chemical descaling/de-varnishing agent through internal cooler passages, flushed system, and replaced oil filter.
parts_used: Coil Cleaning Degreaser (2 Gallons), Replacement Cooler Core Gaskets

symptom_description: Thermal inspection (`IR gun`) showed seized return idler bearing reaching `100`°C. Sparks visible (`slight` hazard) under dark operating conditions.
root_cause: Severe impact shock loading at transfer chute drop point overloaded standard idler bearings beyond static load rating.
action_taken: Locked out conveyor, removed 6 seized and noisy troughing idler assemblies along carry span, and installed new sealed-for-life CEMA C heavy-duty idler rollers.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Impact Troughing Idler Assemblies (Set of 2), Return Rollers (4-Pack), Idler Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Oil sight glass shows distinct dark, foamy oil with heavy sludge formation. Compressor running `99`°C above normal discharge temp.
root_cause: Mixing of incompatible lubricant brands during top-off by operations caused chemical precipitation and foaming.
action_taken: Performed complete oil system flush, replaced spin-on oil filter and separator cartridge, and verified thermostatic valve operation.
parts_used: Complete Maintenance Filter & Oil Kit (Separator, Oil Filter, Air Filter, Oil)

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`minor`) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Degradation of drain valve internal diaphragm/seal preventing pilot opening during timed drain discharge cycles.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve, cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `35` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly.
root_cause: Corrosion on multi-pin plug connection at chiller microprocessor board resulting from high ambient cabinet humidity.
action_taken: Replaced leaving chilled water NTC thermistor probe, applied thermal paste inside sensor well, and calibrated sensor offset in controller menu.
parts_used: Suction/Discharge Pressure Transducer Kit (0-500 PSI), Sensor Connector Cable Assembly

symptom_description: Tech observed visual vibration and whipping of drive belts across sheaves (`0.32` in/sec RMS on bearing frame).
root_cause: Normal mechanical wear and stretching of V-belts after exceeding 12,000 hours of continuous loading/unloading duty.
action_taken: Swapped out glazed V-belts with new matched set, verified pulley groove profiles for wear, and torqued slide rail bolts.
parts_used: Cogged V-Belt Matched Set (BX-68), Slide Base Bolt Set

symptom_description: Belt running `3 inches` off-center at tail pulley return idlers. Rubbing noise (`cavitation crackling`) and heavy smell of hot rubber near take-up assembly.
root_cause: Structural misalignment or frame skewing caused by forklift impact against conveyor side support legs.
action_taken: Installed 3 self-aligning training return idlers along return span, cleaned material off tail pulley wing rolls, squared take-up bearings, and verified belt centered under full load.
parts_used: Troughing Idler Bracket Set, Replacement Wing Pulley Scraper Blades (2-Pack)

symptom_description: Loud excessive buzzing and arcing sound (`grinding`) heard inside distribution panel enclosure. Localized persistent discoloration on bus connection bolts.
root_cause: Thermal expansion and contraction cycles over years of fluctuating load current caused gradual loosening of bolted busbar and cable lug mechanical terminations.
action_taken: Replaced heat-damaged Phase A and B terminal lugs, polished copper bus interfaces, applied electrical joint compound, torqued hardware to specification, and re-scanned with IR camera under load (`joint temp stabilized at 38°C`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Copper Compression Lugs (Set of 3), Belleville Spring Washers & Grade 8 Bolts, Conductive Electrical Joint Compound (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Transformer emitting distinct buzzing/crackling sound inside tank (`0.44` in/sec RMS on shell). Ultrasonic acoustic survey detected partial discharge near HV winding.
root_cause: Transient overvoltages from switching surges and lightning strikes caused micro-perforations and partial discharge inside inter-turn paper insulation.
action_taken: De-energized transformer, performed comprehensive electrical testing (TTR, Winding Resistance, Sweep Frequency Response Analysis), dried oil via vacuum rig, and added antioxidant additives.
parts_used: Fuller's Earth Filter Cartridges (Set of 6), Silica Gel Breather Desiccant Charge (10 lbs), Oil Passivator Additive (1 Gal)

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `113`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on COMP-201.
root_cause: Vibration fatigue cracked copper capillary tube at brazed connection to hot gas bypass valve manifold.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier, evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C.
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Moisture sensor in pump oil chamber triggered high humidity/water interlock alarm on main control panel.
root_cause: Improper tension on seal spring during previous overhaul allowed fluid separation across stationary face.
action_taken: Disassembled lower end, renewed double mechanical seal assembly and O-rings, and pressure tested oil chamber to 15 PSI.
parts_used: Double Mechanical Seal Assembly, Seal Chamber Gasket Set

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `concerning` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `> 60%`.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Power factor / Tan-Delta test on transformer windings increased to `1.8%` (`normal < 0.5%`). Furan analysis indicates severe Kraft paper insulation aging (`DP < 250`).
root_cause: Moisture ingress into dielectric oil (`water content > 35 ppm`) absorbed by cellulose paper insulation, drastically reducing breakdown voltage capacity.
action_taken: De-energized transformer, performed comprehensive electrical testing (TTR, Winding Resistance, Sweep Frequency Response Analysis), dried oil via vacuum rig, and added antioxidant additives.
parts_used: Fuller's Earth Filter Cartridges (Set of 6), Silica Gel Breather Desiccant Charge (10 lbs), Oil Passivator Additive (1 Gal)

symptom_description: Acoustic tube leak detection alarm triggered. Boiler pressure dropping `36` PSI below setpoint despite burner firing at high fire.
root_cause: Localized waterside oxygen pitting corrosion inside fire tubes due to intermittent failure of boiler feedwater deaerator / oxygen scavenger chemical dosing.
action_taken: Isolated and cooled down boiler, opened front and rear doors, identified 3 leaking fire tubes using hydrostatic test, reamed out and cut out failed tubes, rolled and beaded in new seamless steel boiler tubes, and hydro-tested to 150 PSI.
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Bearing housing running extremely hot and vibrating extreme. Unit shut down immediately by maintenance roundsman.
root_cause: Lube oil contamination with process fluid/water caused breakdown of oil film and subsequent spalling of bearing races.
action_taken: Pulled bearing frame, pressed on new SKF angular contact bearings, replaced lip seals, and realigned shaft.
parts_used: SKF Outboard Angular Contact Bearing, Inboard Roller Bearing, ISO VG 68 Lube Oil

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `sharp` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: External cooling fan cover grid clogged with lint and debris, blocking cooling airflow across motor frame.
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit for low-speed VFD operation and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Multiple distribution target nozzles completely plugged with debris, causing heavy localized channeling and splashing inside tower.
root_cause: Rust flakes and pipe corrosion scales from upstream carbon steel condenser water piping carried into tower distribution header.
action_taken: Replaced 14 broken or missing distribution nozzles, removed heavy algae mats from hot water basin deck, and installed opaque UV-blocking basin covers.
parts_used: Non-Clog Distribution Nozzle Assembly (18-Pack), Basin Sealing Gasket Strip

symptom_description: Chiller low refrigerant charge warning alarm triggered. Condenser approach temperature `drastic` elevated (`> 4.5°C`).
root_cause: Thermal expansion cycles loosened flange bolts on compressor suction elbow connection O-ring groove.
action_taken: Eddy current tested evaporator tube bundle, identified 2 leaking copper tubes, plugged tubes using brass tapered drive plugs, evacuated chiller shell, and restored virgin R-134a charge.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)

symptom_description: Chiller controller displaying erratic leaving chilled water temperature (`reading jumps rapidly between 101°C and -15°C`). Unit locked out on freeze protection.
root_cause: Corrosion on multi-pin plug connection at chiller microprocessor board resulting from high ambient cabinet humidity.
action_taken: Replaced leaving chilled water NTC thermistor probe, applied thermal paste inside sensor well, and calibrated sensor offset in controller menu.
parts_used: Water Temperature Sensor Assembly, Electronic Contact Cleaner Spray

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor failing to start (`148` Amps draw). High dew point alarm (`> 15°C`) active on panel.
root_cause: Internal discharge valve reed fracture inside hermetic shell causing complete loss of pumping capacity.
action_taken: Replaced internal hermetic refrigeration compressor assembly, installed new suction/liquid line filter driers, pulled deep vacuum, and recharged system.
parts_used: Replacement Hermetic Refrigeration Compressor Assembly, Bi-Flow Filter Drier, R-134a Charge (6 lbs)

symptom_description: Heavy white/brown mineral scale (`sharp` crust thickness) visible on PVC fill media and drift eliminators during weekly inspection.
root_cause: High cycles of concentration (`> 6.0`) operated without adequate bleed-off rate due to stuck automatic conductivity blowdown valve.
action_taken: Descaled distribution header and nozzles, vacuumed scale debris from cold water basin, and repaired chemical scale inhibitor dosing pump tubing.
parts_used: Cooling Tower Spray Nozzles (12-Pack), Conductivity Blowdown Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit

symptom_description: Intermittent flame failure lockouts during high-to-low fire modulation transitions. Tech observed excessive yellow, smoky flame instead of tight blue pattern.
root_cause: Modulating linkage motor actuator slipped on damper shaft, causing combustion air damper to lag behind fuel valve opening during firing rate changes.
action_taken: Cleaned burner diffuser and ignition assembly, replaced cracked pilot electrode ceramic, calibrated fuel/air cam profile across all firing rates, and cleared flame safeguard lockout.
parts_used: Flame Scanner Replacement Unit, Ignition Transformer 10kV, Linkage Ball Joints (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels gradual hot to the touch. High load demand from driven equipment (CNV-602) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `> 60%`.
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit for low-speed VFD operation and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels.
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: High discharge temperature trip (`> 110°C`) activated. Air blowing back through intake air filter assembly during unloader cycle.
root_cause: Broken valve spring allowed valve disc to flutter and slam against guard, cracking valve seating surface.
action_taken: Disassembled valve pockets, cleaned carbon buildup using chemical solvent, and installed new reed valve rebuild kits.
parts_used: Reed Valve Replacement Pack, Valve Cover O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Control panel showing earth fault. Inspection of power cable drop revealed heavy cuts and exposed copper armor.
root_cause: Continuous vibration and turbulence caused power cable to chafe against concrete edge of sump pit access hatch.
action_taken: Spliced and potted cable using marine-grade resin splice kit, installed protective stainless abrasion sleeve over guide rail area.
parts_used: Power Cable Assembly, Rubber Chafing Guard, Gland Kit

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels unusual hot to the touch.
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `> 60%`.
action_taken: De-energized motor, removed fan cover, and thoroughly cleaned cooling fins and fan blades using dry compressed air and degreaser.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `93`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `145°C` alarm limit.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: None

symptom_description: Internal discharge temperature trip on scroll compressor (`> 125°C`). Unit making distinct persistent grinding sound during shutdown spindown. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to TOWER-302.
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of internal Oldham coupling ring inside scroll set due to thousands of thermal/pressure cycles.
action_taken: Replaced scroll compressor assembly, renewed suction accumulator and filter drier, verified crankcase heater continuity, and charged circuit precisely by weight.
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Replacement Assembly, Suction Accumulator Vessel, Filter Drier Element, R-410A (28 lbs)

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels gradual hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: Cleared blockage from cooling fan intake grid, washed frame fins, and verified balanced supply voltage (`460V` +/- 1%).
parts_used: None

symptom_description: Loud significant grinding high-pitched squealing sound from cooling tower fan gearbox/motor coupling. Fan blades spinning erratically. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on CHILL-302.
root_cause: Phase loss on 460V incoming feed caused single-phasing thermal burnout of cooling tower induction motor windings.
action_taken: Removed failed cooling tower fan motor using crane, installed severe-duty TEFC replacement motor, renewed shaft alignment, and sealed terminal box with RTV.
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Tower Induction Motor, Flexible Drive Shaft Coupling, Motor Rain Canopy

symptom_description: Conveyor drive motor tripped VFD/thermal overload relay (`motor current spiked to 150 Amps vs 32A FLA`). Drive pulley stationary while motor humming. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on MOTOR-602.
root_cause: Severe mechanical binding and increased drag caused by multiple seized idler rollers and caked material dragging against bottom belt return span.
action_taken: Shoveled out heavy material spillage burying tail pulley and return belt span, replaced 4 locked-up return idlers, refilled fluid coupling with fresh ISO VG 32 oil, and installed new thermal fuse plug.
parts_used: Replacement Return Idlers (Set of 6), Motor Terminal Lug Kit

symptom_description: Main breaker tripped instantly upon energization. Stator surge comparison test confirmed turn-to-turn short in phase coil.
root_cause: Contamination of stator coils with airborne conductive dust and moisture due to missing terminal box gasket.
action_taken: Removed motor from base plate, transported to electrical rebuild facility for complete Class H stator rewind and VPI dip.
parts_used: Class H Stator Rewind Service, Motor Lead Lug Kit, Terminal Box Gasket

symptom_description: Loud persistent humming and `57` Amps locked rotor current when compressor attempts to start. Main breaker trips after 3 seconds.
root_cause: Mechanical seizure of hermetic scroll/reciprocating compressor internal bearings due to prolonged loss of oil return from system.
action_taken: Replaced internal hermetic refrigeration compressor assembly, installed new suction/liquid line filter driers, pulled deep vacuum, and recharged system.
parts_used: Hermetic Scroll Compressor Unit, Liquid Line Drier, R-407C Refrigerant (8 lbs)

symptom_description: Drive motor drawing continuous `107` Amps (`115%` rating). Gearbox output shaft rotating sluggishly with high laboring noise (`metallic clattering`).
root_cause: Conveyor overloaded beyond maximum design capacity (`surge loading from upstream bin discharge exceeding 600 TPH`).
action_taken: Excavated packed material from tail take-up frame, lubricated take-up slide ways, replaced 5 dragging idler rollers, and tested conveyor startup under standard load.
parts_used: Fluid Coupling Fusible Plug, Return Rollers (5-Pack), Gearbox Top-off Oil

symptom_description: Loud gradual metallic clicking and grinding inside compressor cylinder head during compression stroke. Capacity down by `concerning`. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on DRYER-201.
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of stainless steel valve plate/reed inside discharge valve assembly due to billions of cyclic flexures.
action_taken: Disassembled valve pockets, cleaned carbon buildup using chemical solvent, and installed new reed valve rebuild kits.
parts_used: Valve Rebuild Kit (Plates, Springs, Seats), High-Temp Head Gaskets

symptom_description: Loud severe hissing and steam escaping sound (`screeching`) audible inside furnace firebox when burner cycles off. White steam blowing out of stack.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to 105°C.
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Chiller low refrigerant charge warning alarm triggered. Condenser approach temperature `extreme` elevated (`> 4.5°C`).
root_cause: Degraded elastomeric O-ring seal on condenser relief/rupture disc flange assembly allowing gradual low-pressure refrigerant seepage.
action_taken: Eddy current tested evaporator tube bundle, identified 2 leaking copper tubes, plugged tubes using brass tapered drive plugs, evacuated chiller shell, and restored virgin R-134a charge.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `concerning` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: Voltage unbalance of `3.8%` across supply lines caused `35%` increase in localized rotor/stator heating.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Compressor cycling on high temp interlock (`> 105°C`). Cooling fan running but `marked` temperature drop across aftercooler.
root_cause: Low oil level in compressor sump due to gradual carryover past aging separator element.
action_taken: Circulated chemical descaling/de-varnishing agent through internal cooler passages, flushed system, and replaced oil filter.
parts_used: De-Varnishing Chemical Flush (5 Gal), Spin-On Oil Filter, Cooler Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Elevated bearing housing temperature (`90`°C measured via infrared gun) along with intermittent clicking sound from thrust end. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on MOTOR-102.
root_cause: Improper bearing preload and excessive axial thrust load caused premature cage fracture.
action_taken: Pulled bearing frame, pressed on new SKF angular contact bearings, replaced lip seals, and realigned shaft.
parts_used: Bearing Kit 6309-C3, Lip Seal Set, Shim Pack

symptom_description: Ops reported top cover rubber delaminating (`slight` separation) and severe edge gouging along 15 feet of conveyor belt carrying surface.
root_cause: Skirt board sealing rubber improperly adjusted (`steel backing clamp dropped down`), cutting into moving belt cover like a chisel.
action_taken: Repaired puncture and edge tear using cold vulcanizing patch kit, ground smooth, replaced damaged belt cleaner blade, and verified 3/8-inch skirt board clearance.
parts_used: Belt Repair Cold Vulcanizing Kit, Flexco Mechanical Fastener Set, Rubber Skirt Rubber (15ft)

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`minor` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `91`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Thermal fatigue cracking at tube-to-tubesheet rolled/welded joint caused by rapid cold startups and thermal shock.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to 105°C.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`minor` higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.37` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on CHILL-302.
root_cause: Broken distribution basin covers allowed direct sunlight ingress, accelerating rapid algae growth that blinded distribution target nozzles.
action_taken: Removed hot water basin covers, manually cleared leaves/debris from all distribution nozzles, pressure washed basin, and chlorinated loop.
parts_used: Replacement Distribution Nozzles (24-Pack), Coarse Mesh Inlet Strainer Basket, Shock Biocide (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Conveyor stalled completely during heavy surge loading. Fluid coupling thermal fuse plug melted, discharging coupling oil (`minor` pool on floor).
root_cause: Faulty or misadjusted motor thermal overload relay setting (`set too low at 80% FLA`) or loose phase connection causing phase current unbalance.
action_taken: Shoveled out heavy material spillage burying tail pulley and return belt span, replaced 4 locked-up return idlers, refilled fluid coupling with fresh ISO VG 32 oil, and installed new thermal fuse plug.
parts_used: Fluid Coupling Fusible Plug, Return Rollers (5-Pack), Gearbox Top-off Oil

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing with `noticeable` harmonics.
root_cause: Grease dry-out and thermal degradation due to operating in elevated ambient temperature environment (`> 40°C`).
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit

symptom_description: Loud abnormal whining and screeching sound emanating from motor non-drive end bearing during operation. Inspected power and control interconnects running to PUMP-102 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: De-coupled motor, removed bearing end shields, replaced both DE and NDE bearings with C3 clearance ball bearings, and packed with Polyrex EM.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Oil dripping steadily (`3-5 drops per min`) from top cover bushing turret gasket area. Transformer tank exterior coated in unusual dust and oil.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole developed at bottom weld seam of external cooling radiator fin due to water pooling and debris trapping.

parts_used: Bushing Turret Gasket Set, Radiator Flange O-Rings (Pack of 8), Dielectric Transformer Oil (25 Gallons)

symptom_description: Cooling tower water distribution nozzles partially clogged with lime crust, causing uneven water channeling across fill pack.

symptom_description: Buchholz relay minor alarm active (gas/air collection in chamber). Inspection revealed severe oil seep along main tank cover bolted flange (`0.18` vibration on fins). Also inspected PANEL-401 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole developed at bottom weld seam of external cooling radiator fin due to water pooling and debris trapping.
action_taken: Repaired leaking radiator weld seam using approved epoxy/brazing procedure, replaced tap changer O-ring seal, and refilled transformer with certified Type II dielectric mineral oil.

symptom_description: Ops reported top cover rubber delaminating (`concerning` separation) and severe edge gouging along 15 feet of conveyor belt carrying surface.

action_taken: Repaired puncture and edge tear using cold vulcanizing patch kit, ground smooth, replaced damaged belt cleaner blade, and verified 3/8-inch skirt board clearance.

symptom_description: Dry patches (`severe` un-wetted area) visible across top of PVC fill media. Hot water basin overflowing around distribution basin edges.
root_cause: Accumulation of wind-blown leaves, plastic wrappers, and organic debris in hot water distribution basin plugging nozzle orifices.

symptom_description: Excessive recirculation noise inside casing and gradual pressure drop across pump discharge flange. High load demand from driven equipment (MOTOR-102) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past 12 months eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances.
action_taken: Upgraded impeller to hardened duplex alloy and set proper impeller-to-casing clearances.
