symptom_description: Routine inspection of oil chamber sampling port revealed milky, emulsified oil (`concerning` water contamination).
root_cause: Lower mechanical seal face scoring caused by solid grit and abrasive slurry passing through pump volute.
action_taken: Renewed tandem mechanical seals, replaced corroded seal retainer ring, and verified zero drop on 30-minute pressure decay test.
parts_used: Silicon Carbide Lower Seal Set, Upper Carbon Seal, Dielectric Oil

symptom_description: Conveyor stalled completely during heavy surge loading. Fluid coupling thermal fuse plug melted, discharging coupling oil (`slight` pool on floor). Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on MOTOR-602.
root_cause: Tail pulley or take-up assembly jammed with packed solid material, creating immense frictional drag against belt movement.
action_taken: Cleared excess surge material load from belt carrying surface, freed up 6 jammed idler rollers under skirt board, reset motor thermal overload relay, and verified normal running draw (`28 Amps`).
parts_used: Thermal Overload Relay Element, Take-up Slide Lubricant (1 Can), Troughing Idler Rollers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Oil analysis report indicates high acid number (TAN > 1.5) and severe particulate depletion of anti-wear additives. Checked mechanical alignment and interlocks with coupled unit DRYER-202 during inspection.
root_cause: Mixing of incompatible lubricant brands during top-off by operations caused chemical precipitation and foaming.
action_taken: Flushed reservoir, replaced oil filter and separator element, cleaned thermal bypass valve, and took fresh baseline oil sample.
parts_used: Oil Filter Cartridge, Separator Kit, Compressor Flushing Fluid (2 Gal), Synthetic Lube Oil

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from transformer tank. Infrared scan showed `moderate` localized heating around LV bushing terminations (`115°C`).
root_cause: Severe harmonic current loading (`THD > 15%`) from downstream VFD drives caused elevated eddy current and stray load losses inside transformer core/windings.
action_taken: Replaced defective cooling fan bank contactor and thermal overload relays, pressure washed radiator fins with low-pressure water, and verified all 6 cooling fans operational.
parts_used: Cooling Fan Contactor 3-Pole 240V, Thermal Overload Relay, Cooling Fan Motor 1/2 HP TEAO

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight of scale deposits.
root_cause: Seasonal evaporation concentration combined with hard makeup water (`> 250 ppm calcium`) in absence of softening pretreatment.
action_taken: Descaled distribution header and nozzles, vacuumed scale debris from cold water basin, and repaired chemical scale inhibitor dosing pump tubing.
parts_used: Cooling Tower Spray Nozzles (12-Pack), Conductivity Blowdown Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit

symptom_description: Voltage imbalance of `sharp` across panel busbars under heavy load. Noticeable smell of heated ozone/insulation near panel vents. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from XFMR-402.
root_cause: Galvanic corrosion and oxidation between dissimilar metals (`copper cable to aluminum bus lug`) causing high joint contact resistance.
action_taken: Replaced heat-damaged Phase A and B terminal lugs, polished copper bus interfaces, applied electrical joint compound, torqued hardware to specification, and re-scanned with IR camera under load (`joint temp stabilized at 38°C`).
parts_used: Silver-Plated Busbar Splice Plates (2-Pack), Anti-Oxidation Compound Paste, High-Tensile Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Longitudinal rip (`marked` length, ~4 feet long) gouged into top rubber cover of conveyor belt near loading transfer chute.
root_cause: Sharp piece of tramp metal or structural steel bracket broke off and wedged between skirt board and belt surface at loading chute, gouging belt during transit.
action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Conveyor Belt Replacement Section (3-ply, 12ft), Flexco Bolt Solid Plate Fasteners (Box of 25), Skirt Clamps

symptom_description: Drive belts show severe side wear, fraying cords, and glazing across pulley contact surfaces. Tension significantly degraded.
root_cause: Normal mechanical wear and stretching of V-belts after exceeding 12,000 hours of continuous loading/unloading duty.
action_taken: Cleaned oil mist off sheave grooves using solvent, installed new matched V-belt set, and adjusted motor slide base tension.
parts_used: Heavy Duty V-Belt Set (3-Pack), Solvent Cleaner (1 Can)

symptom_description: Water sight level glass on moisture separator bowl completely full of liquid. Electronic drain solenoid clicking but no water discharging.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap and flushed separator bowl.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels abnormal hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: De-energized motor, removed fan cover, and thoroughly cleaned cooling fins and fan blades using dry compressed air and degreaser.
parts_used: None

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`sharp` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly.
root_cause: Thermal bowing of rotor shaft caused by previous localized stator winding hotspot during high load run.
action_taken: Replaced cracked external cooling fan, cleaned rotor end rings, and applied trim balance weights to drive-end balance plane.
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Acoustic tube leak detection alarm triggered. Boiler pressure dropping `26` PSI below setpoint despite burner firing at high fire.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Performed complete tube replacement of bottom two passes (18 tubes), renewed front and rear refractory door gaskets, performed boil-out chemical cleaning, and verified zero drop on 4-hour hydro test.
parts_used: Replacement Fire Tubes SA-178 (18-Pack), Front/Rear Boiler Door Refractory & Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight of scale deposits.
root_cause: Improper pH control (`pH > 8.8`) caused rapid precipitation of calcium and magnesium scale across warm PVC fill surfaces.
action_taken: Pressure washed PVC fill pack and drift eliminators with low-pressure wide-fan nozzle, repaired conductivity blowdown valve, and calibrated chemical dosing.
parts_used: Cooling Tower Descaling Chemical (15 Gal), Bio-Dispersant (5 Gal), Replacement PVC Fill Block Sections (4 Bundles)

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`noticeable` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `93`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Opened fireside doors, plugged 2 leaking tubes using certified tapered steel boiler tube plugs as temporary repair, calibrated oxygen scavenger chemical dosing pump, and scheduled full retubing during summer outage.
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Megger insulation resistance between HV and LV windings dropped `severe` compared to factory baseline (`reading 250 Mega-ohms at 5kV`).
root_cause: Sludge formation from oxidized dielectric oil deposited onto winding ducts, restricting localized natural oil convection and creating severe thermal hotspots.
action_taken: De-energized transformer, performed comprehensive electrical testing (TTR, Winding Resistance, Sweep Frequency Response Analysis), dried oil via vacuum rig, and added antioxidant additives.
parts_used: Vacuum Rig Filter Elements, Type II Dielectric Oil Top-off (30 Gal), Indicating Silica Gel Desiccant

symptom_description: Low refrigerant charge alarm active on scroll chiller controller. Tech noted slight oil residue on condenser header braze joint.
root_cause: Loose flare nut connection on sight glass or filter drier fitting allowing slow loss of R-410A/R-407C over past cooling season.
action_taken: Tightened sight glass and filter drier flare nuts, replaced Schrader valve cores, pulled 12-hour deep vacuum, and recharged circuit A with precise weight of R-410A.
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Seal Caps (4-Pack), R-410A Refrigerant (18 lbs), Flare Gasket Set

symptom_description: Phase current imbalance exceeding `22%` (`130` Amps Phase A vs normal Phase B/C). Motor running extremely rough.
root_cause: Age-related thermal brittleness of Class F winding insulation accelerated by frequent motor start/stop cycles.
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement, renewed lead lugs, and verified balance and alignment with driven load.
parts_used: Stator Rewind Kit, VFD Output Line Reactor, Terminal Gasket

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `111`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `145°C` alarm limit.
root_cause: Voltage unbalance of `3.8%` across supply lines caused `35%` increase in localized rotor/stator heating.
action_taken: De-energized motor, removed fan cover, and thoroughly cleaned cooling fins and fan blades using dry compressed air and degreaser.
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from transformer tank. Infrared scan showed `noticeable` localized heating around LV bushing terminations (`115°C`).
root_cause: Low dielectric oil level in main tank prevented natural circulation (`ONAN`) of hot oil through top radiator headers.
action_taken: Replaced defective cooling fan bank contactor and thermal overload relays, pressure washed radiator fins with low-pressure water, and verified all 6 cooling fans operational.
parts_used: Cooling Fan Contactor 3-Pole 240V, Thermal Overload Relay, Cooling Fan Motor 1/2 HP TEAO

symptom_description: Found persistent fluid dripping constantly from pump stuffing box area. Pool of process fluid accumulating on baseplate.
root_cause: Mechanical seal faces scored due to abrasive particles in process fluid and inadequate seal flush filtration.
action_taken: Replaced damaged seal faces and installed upgraded cyclone separator in seal flush loop.
parts_used: Mechanical Seal Repair Kit, Viton O-Ring Set

symptom_description: VFD indicating ground fault trip on cooling tower fan feed. Megger test shows dead short (`0.02 Mega-ohms`) on motor leads. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on CHILL-301.
root_cause: Prolonged operation in saturated 100% humidity environment degraded Class F insulation varnish beyond dielectric limit.
action_taken: Installed new vertical fan drive motor, renewed motor shaft seal and rain canopy, greased bearings with waterproof grease, and tested VFD speed steps.
parts_used: Inverter-Duty Fan Motor Assembly, Lower Bearing Waterproof Lip Seal, Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Chiller tripped on low evaporator pressure cutout during pull-down. Sight glass on liquid line shows continuous stream of bubbles.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole in evaporator copper tube sheet bundle caused by winter freeze-thaw or aggressive chilled water treatment.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly, renewed oil separation filters, evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)

symptom_description: Buchholz relay minor alarm active (gas/air collection in chamber). Inspection revealed high oil seep along main tank cover bolted flange (`0.45` vibration on fins).
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole developed at bottom weld seam of external cooling radiator fin due to water pooling and debris trapping.
action_taken: Isolated transformer, replaced degraded bushing turret gaskets and radiator flange gaskets using nitrile cork sheets, vacuum treated and topped off dielectric oil.
parts_used: Complete Transformer Sealing Gasket Kit, Dielectric Oil Top-off Drums (20 Gal)

symptom_description: Gradual degradation in discharge flow (`minor` reduction). Casing inspection revealed high internal turbulence and hissing.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past 12 months eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances.
action_taken: Replaced eroded impeller assembly, renewed front/rear wear rings, and balanced rotor assembly dynamically.
parts_used: Duplex Stainless Impeller, Wear Ring Kit

symptom_description: Dry patches (`severe` un-wetted area) visible across top of PVC fill media. Hot water basin overflowing around distribution basin edges.
root_cause: Broken distribution basin covers allowed direct sunlight ingress, accelerating rapid algae growth that blinded distribution target nozzles.
action_taken: Replaced 14 broken or missing distribution nozzles, removed heavy algae mats from hot water basin deck, and installed opaque UV-blocking basin covers.
parts_used: Polypropylene Target Spray Nozzles (15-Pack), Basin Cover Fasteners

symptom_description: Boiler making unusual popping and kettling sounds (`cavitation crackling`) from waterside during high fire operation. Bottom blowdown discharging high heavy scale chips.
root_cause: Under-dosing of internal boiler scale treatment chemical (`phosphate/polymer dispersant`) over past 6 months due to chemical pump air-lock.
action_taken: Mechanically scraped tubesheet and lower drum surfaces through handholes, flushed heavy scale debris from bottom header, rebuilt automatic surface blowdown controller, and replaced water softener resin.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Compressor short cycling on low-pressure cutout switch. Tech observed severe oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Vibration fatigue cracked copper capillary tube at brazed connection to hot gas bypass valve manifold.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps, pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification.
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Strong physical vibration felt on motor baseplate. Spectrum analysis confirms pure once-per-revolution imbalance frequency. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to PUMP-101.
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue over extended service.
action_taken: Re-balanced rotor assembly in field using dual-channel vibration analyzer, reducing 1X peak below 0.05 in/sec RMS.
parts_used: Rotor Balancing Clip Set, External Cooling Fan

symptom_description: Compressed air exiting dryer feels humid (`severe` moisture present). Refrigerant sight glass shows bubbles and low charge indicator.
root_cause: Vibration fatigue cracked copper capillary tube at brazed connection to hot gas bypass valve manifold.
action_taken: Recovered remaining refrigerant charge, repaired cracked capillary tube brazed joint with 15% silver solder, evacuated to 500 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-134a.
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`extreme` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly.
root_cause: Slight bending of motor shaft resulting from historical mechanical jam on driven equipment coupling.
action_taken: Disassembled cooling fan shroud, cleaned rotor assembly, and performed in-situ two-plane dynamic field balancing using balancing trim weights.
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assembly, Shaft Key, Balancing Weights

symptom_description: Purge unit running excessively (`> 45 minutes per hour` exhausting non-condensables). Tech noted distinct oil film near rupture disc flange.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole in evaporator copper tube sheet bundle caused by winter freeze-thaw or aggressive chilled water treatment.
action_taken: Eddy current tested evaporator tube bundle, identified 2 leaking copper tubes, plugged tubes using brass tapered drive plugs, evacuated chiller shell, and restored virgin R-134a charge.
parts_used: Centrifugal Compressor Shaft Seal Assembly, Oil Filter Element, R-134a (65 lbs)

symptom_description: Stator RTD temperature alarm active. Motor drawing `183` Amps (`98%` FLA) with significant thermal buildup on frame.
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `> 60%`.
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit for low-speed VFD operation and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels.
parts_used: None

symptom_description: Drive motor drawing continuous `44` Amps (`115%` rating). Gearbox output shaft rotating sluggishly with excessive laboring noise (`buzzing/humming`).
root_cause: Tail pulley or take-up assembly jammed with packed solid material, creating immense frictional drag against belt movement.
action_taken: Excavated packed material from tail take-up frame, lubricated take-up slide ways, replaced 5 dragging idler rollers, and tested conveyor startup under standard load.
parts_used: Replacement Return Idlers (Set of 6), Motor Terminal Lug Kit

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`minor` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly.
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake/dirt inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe, and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade.
parts_used: Rotor Balancing Clip Set, External Cooling Fan

symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`noticeable` higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.20` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header. Note: Vibration and harmonic resonance appear transmitted from CHILL-301.
root_cause: Broken distribution basin covers allowed direct sunlight ingress, accelerating rapid algae growth that blinded distribution target nozzles.
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned 36 target spray nozzles, flushed main distribution header piping, installed new coarse inlet strainer baskets, and shock-chlorinated tower.
parts_used: UV-Blocking Basin Cover Panels (Set of 4), Target Nozzle Kit (10-Pack)

symptom_description: High air discharge temperature trip (`98`°C) shut down compressor package. Oil cooler radiator feels intermittent hot across all passes.
root_cause: Internal oil cooler passages partially plugged with oil varnish deposits, reducing heat transfer efficiency.
action_taken: Circulated chemical descaling/de-varnishing agent through internal cooler passages, flushed system, and replaced oil filter.
parts_used: Coil Cleaning Degreaser (2 Gallons), Replacement Cooler Core Gaskets

symptom_description: Air discharge temp steadily climbing over past 48 hours, reaching `110`°C during peak shift demands.
root_cause: Internal oil cooler passages partially plugged with oil varnish deposits, reducing heat transfer efficiency.
action_taken: Cleaned cooler core fins, adjusted cabinet ventilation louvers, and verified discharge temperature stabilized at 82°C under full load.
parts_used: Thermostatic Oil Bypass Valve Kit, Compressor Oil (1 Gal), O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Liquid water blowing down downstream compressed air lines (`minor` moisture in plant header). Dryer automatic drain valve silent.
root_cause: Degradation of drain valve internal diaphragm/seal preventing pilot opening during timed drain discharge cycles.
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned moisture separator sump, installed new drain solenoid valve rebuild kit, and verified timed discharge cycles.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Top oil temperature gauge reading `81`°C (`high alarm setpoint 85°C`). Winding hot-spot temperature indicator reaching `102°C` under `85%` load.
root_cause: External radiator fins heavily clogged with airborne cottonwood fluff, dust, and industrial dirt, reducing convective heat rejection by `> 50%`.
action_taken: Replaced faulty cooling fan control thermostat switch, serviced fan bank electrical panel, cleaned radiator fins, and verified top oil temperature dropped to `71°C`.
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assemblies (Set of 2), Fan Control Thermostat Switch, Radiator Fin Cleaner

symptom_description: Phase A terminal lug glowing red under peak shift current (`210` Amps). Thermal imaging shows `112°C` temperature at cable-to-bus bolted joint.
root_cause: Thermal expansion and contraction cycles over years of fluctuating load current caused gradual loosening of bolted busbar and cable lug mechanical terminations.
action_taken: Replaced heat-damaged Phase A and B terminal lugs, polished copper bus interfaces, applied electrical joint compound, torqued hardware to specification, and re-scanned with IR camera under load (`joint temp stabilized at 38°C`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Copper Compression Lugs (Set of 3), Belleville Spring Washers & Grade 8 Bolts, Conductive Electrical Joint Compound (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Tech noted intermittent grease discoloration leaking from bearing grease relief tube and metallic clattering.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Conveyor belt mistracking severely (`extreme` off-center toward right side). Belt edge rubbing against steel conveyor frame (`cavitation crackling` squealing sound and rubber dust).
root_cause: Structural misalignment or frame skewing caused by forklift impact against conveyor side support legs.
action_taken: Scraped caked debris from drive and tail pulleys, adjusted gravity take-up counterweight guides, realigned troughing idler brackets, and verified straight tracking across all zones.
parts_used: Troughing Idler Bracket Set, Replacement Wing Pulley Scraper Blades (2-Pack)

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`noticeable` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `103`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Thermal fatigue cracking at tube-to-tubesheet rolled/welded joint caused by rapid cold startups and thermal shock.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to 105°C.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from transformer tank. Infrared scan showed `marked` localized heating around LV bushing terminations (`115°C`).
root_cause: Low dielectric oil level in main tank prevented natural circulation (`ONAN`) of hot oil through top radiator headers.
action_taken: Replaced defective cooling fan bank contactor and thermal overload relays, pressure washed radiator fins with low-pressure water, and verified all 6 cooling fans operational.
parts_used: Cooling Fan Contactor 3-Pole 240V, Thermal Overload Relay, Cooling Fan Motor 1/2 HP TEAO

symptom_description: Belt slip alarm triggered (`marked` RPM mismatch between motor and compressor end). Black rubber dust accumulating under drive guard.
root_cause: Improper initial belt tensioning (`too loose`) allowed slippage and frictional glazing during high torque starts.
action_taken: Locked out unit, removed belt guard, replaced matched set of 4 V-belts, laser aligned sheaves, and tensioned to sonic gauge spec (`45 Hz`).
parts_used: Heavy Duty V-Belt Set (3-Pack), Solvent Cleaner (1 Can)

symptom_description: Loud severe whining and hissing sound emanating from motor non-drive end bearing during operation. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on CNV-602.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Safety relief valve leaking significant live steam (`metallic clattering` hissing) across seat during standby pressure. Valve body running extremely hot (`96`°C).
root_cause: Fatigue relaxation or corrosion of internal safety valve helical compression spring caused reduction in popping set pressure over 5+ years of continuous service.
action_taken: Replaced primary and secondary steam safety relief valves with calibrated code-stamped spares, adjusted vent piping expansion slip joint to eliminate mechanical strain, and tested pop pressure.
parts_used: Certified Steam Safety Relief Valve Assembly 150 PSI, Discharge Pipe Drip Pan Elbow, Flange Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `117`°C. High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.23` in/sec RMS) detected.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: De-coupled motor, removed bearing end shields, replaced both DE and NDE bearings with C3 clearance ball bearings, and packed with Polyrex EM.
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Waterside inspection through handholes reveals `concerning` thick hard calcium/silicate mineral scale crust on fire tube surfaces and furnace tube sheet.
root_cause: Improper functioning of duplex water softener (resin exhausted or regeneration timer failure) allowed hard water (`> 120 ppm total hardness`) directly into boiler feedwater.
action_taken: Mechanically scraped tubesheet and lower drum surfaces through handholes, flushed heavy scale debris from bottom header, rebuilt automatic surface blowdown controller, and replaced water softener resin.
parts_used: Inhibited Sulfamic Acid Boiler Descaler (30 Gallons), Neutralizing Compound (10 lbs), Handhole & Manway Gasket Set (Pack of 12)

symptom_description: Idler roller completely seized (`0 RPM rotation`). Conveyor belt sliding across stationary steel shell (`extreme` flat spot worn into roller and hot rubber smell).
root_cause: Severe impact shock loading at transfer chute drop point overloaded standard idler bearings beyond static load rating.
action_taken: Performed complete idler walkaround audit, replacing 12 seized or noisy idler rollers across carry and return spans, and cleared material buildup around tail area.
parts_used: Replacement Sealed Idler Rollers (Pack of 8), Impact Roller Kit (4-Pack)

symptom_description: High torque alarm active on conveyor drive controller. Motor frame temperature `99`°C (`moderate` overheating). Conveyor struggling to start under load.
root_cause: Conveyor overloaded beyond maximum design capacity (`surge loading from upstream bin discharge exceeding 600 TPH`).
action_taken: Cleared excess surge material load from belt carrying surface, freed up 6 jammed idler rollers under skirt board, reset motor thermal overload relay, and verified normal running draw (`28 Amps`).
parts_used: Fluid Coupling Fusible Plug, Return Rollers (5-Pack), Gearbox Top-off Oil

symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test or opened `18 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Fatigue relaxation or corrosion of internal safety valve helical compression spring caused reduction in popping set pressure over 5+ years of continuous service.
action_taken: Replaced primary and secondary steam safety relief valves with calibrated code-stamped spares, adjusted vent piping expansion slip joint to eliminate mechanical strain, and tested pop pressure.

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.24` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents.

root_cause: Corrosion on multi-pin plug connection at chiller microprocessor board resulting from high ambient cabinet humidity.

symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker. Motor frame burning hot (`95`°C) with `concerning` smoke from terminal box.

symptom_description: Refrigeration compressor tripped internal thermal overload switch. Hermetic shell burning hot (`93`°C) with zero cooling output.

symptom_description: Infrared (`IR`) thermography inspection revealed severe hotspot (`102`°C, `delta-T > 45°C above ambient`) on Phase B main busbar lug termination.

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`minor`) around bottom cabinet base.

symptom_description: Dissolved Gas Analysis (DGA) annual oil sample showed elevated acetylene (`> 15 ppm`) and hydrogen (`> 300 ppm`), indicating internal arcing/partial discharge.

root_cause: Galvanic corrosion and oxidation between dissimilar metals (`copper cable to aluminum bus lug`) causing high joint contact resistance.
action_taken: Scheduled emergency shutdown, disassembled Phase B cable lug and busbar joint, cleaned oxidized contact faces with Scotch-Brite, applied conductive joint compound, and torqued bolts to factory spec (`275 in-lbs`) using Belleville washers.
parts_used: Replacement Terminal Lugs 500 MCM, Hardware & Washer Kit, Electrical Contact Cleaner

symptom_description: Heavy white/brown mineral scale (`extreme` crust thickness) visible on PVC fill media and drift eliminators during weekly inspection.
root_cause: Improper pH control (`pH > 8.8`) caused rapid precipitation of calcium and magnesium scale across warm PVC fill surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated bio-dispersant and mild descaling agent through tower loop for 12 hours, flushed cold water basin, and serviced bleed-off solenoid.
parts_used: Cooling Tower Descaling Chemical (15 Gal), Bio-Dispersant (5 Gal), Replacement PVC Fill Block Sections (4 Bundles)

symptom_description: Compressor short cycling on low-pressure cutout switch. Tech observed heavy oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Vibration fatigue cracked copper capillary tube at brazed connection to hot gas bypass valve manifold.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier, evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C.
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing with `marked` harmonics. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on PUMP-102.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings after exceeding 40,000 hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set, cleaned grease cavities, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Phase current imbalance exceeding `22%` (`103` Amps Phase A vs normal Phase B/C). Motor running extremely rough.
root_cause: Voltage spikes from VFD switching transients exceeded insulation dielectric breakdown threshold.
action_taken: Swapped out failed motor with certified warehouse spare unit; sent damaged stator for rewind and core loss testing.
parts_used: Stator Rewind Kit, VFD Output Line Reactor, Terminal Gasket

symptom_description: Relief valve popped off prematurely at `35` PSI during normal operation (`nameplate setpoint 150 PSI`). Valve fails to reseat tightly after blowing down.
root_cause: Normal mechanical seat wear and wire-drawing erosion across sealing faces from prolonged minor steam weeping.
action_taken: Swapped out defective safety valve with NBBI certified replacement assembly, renewed flange gaskets and high-tensile studs, and documented ASME pop test during firing startup.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Main molded case circuit breaker (`MCCB`) failed to trip during downstream short circuit event, causing upstream feeder breaker to clear fault.
root_cause: Electronic trip unit (`ETU`) microprocessor failure caused by voltage surge transients on control power feed.
action_taken: Replaced complete draw-out air circuit breaker (`ACB`) assembly, renewed bus terminal stabs, and verified all protection settings against engineering coordination study.
parts_used: Draw-Out Circuit Breaker Assembly 800A, Shunt Trip Coil 120VAC, Phase Barrier Kit

symptom_description: Transformer tripping on top-stage oil temperature relay during peak afternoon ambient temperature (`sharp` above design).
root_cause: Severe harmonic current loading (`THD > 15%`) from downstream VFD drives caused elevated eddy current and stray load losses inside transformer core/windings.
action_taken: Topped off dielectric oil level to normal operating mark, cleaned radiator fin passages, and replaced loose LV bushing internal terminal palm connections.
parts_used: LV Bushing Terminal Palm Clamp Kit, Fan Contactor Kit

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`drastic` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `96`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Waterside scale accumulation (`> 1/16 inch thick`) caused localized insulating effect, leading to tube metal overheating and stress rupture.
action_taken: Isolated and cooled down boiler, opened front and rear doors, identified 3 leaking fire tubes using hydrostatic test, reamed out and cut out failed tubes, rolled and beaded in new seamless steel boiler tubes, and hydro-tested to 150 PSI.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `110`°C. High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.25` in/sec RMS) detected.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings after exceeding 40,000 hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set, cleaned grease cavities, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly.
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`minor` higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.42` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header.
root_cause: Rust flakes and pipe corrosion scales from upstream carbon steel condenser water piping carried into tower distribution header.
action_taken: Replaced 14 broken or missing distribution nozzles, removed heavy algae mats from hot water basin deck, and installed opaque UV-blocking basin covers.
parts_used: UV-Blocking Basin Cover Panels (Set of 4), Target Nozzle Kit (10-Pack)

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight of scale deposits.
root_cause: Failure of chemical scale inhibitor/dispersant dosing pump allowed calcium carbonate hardness to exceed saturation index.
action_taken: Descaled distribution header and nozzles, vacuumed scale debris from cold water basin, and repaired chemical scale inhibitor dosing pump tubing.
parts_used: Distribution Nozzle Replacement Set (20-Pack), Conductivity Controller Probe, Chemical Pump Peristaltic Tubing

symptom_description: Fuel consumption increased by `18%` per ton of steam generated (`moderate` efficiency drop). Low water cutoff float chamber fouled with sludge accumulation.
root_cause: High feedwater silica concentration combined with excessive cycles of concentration formed hard, dense silicate scale that cannot be removed by normal blowdown.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution through boiler waterside loop for 16 hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Ops flagged oil leakage from radiator drain valve and tap changer gasket. Dielectric oil level dropped `drastic` below normal indicator mark.
root_cause: Thermal expansion and contraction cycles loosened bolted flange connections across cooling radiator bank manifolds.
action_taken: Re-torqued all exterior radiator and cover flange bolts to 45 ft-lbs, replaced leaking drain valve assembly, topped off insulating oil, and pulled oil sample for DGA test.
parts_used: Nitrile-Cork Transformer Gasket Sheet Kit, Type II Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (15 Gallons), Flange Bolt Set

symptom_description: Evaporator level sensor indicating low charge (`moderate` drop). Purge pump-out frequency increased `300%` over baseline. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on TOWER-301.
root_cause: Thermal expansion cycles loosened flange bolts on compressor suction elbow connection O-ring groove.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly, renewed oil separation filters, evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate.
parts_used: Carbon Steel Rupture Disc Assembly, Neoprene Flange O-Ring, R-134a Refrigerant (120 lbs)

symptom_description: Coupling insert wearing rapidly (`concerning` shedding of elastomeric dust). High radial vibration measured on inboard bearing pads.
root_cause: Thermal growth differential between pump and motor not compensated for during initial cold alignment.
action_taken: Performed precision laser alignment between pump and driving motor, bringing angular and parallel offset within 0.002 inches.
parts_used: Omega Coupling Half and Element

symptom_description: Unit exhibiting sharp vibration across coupling guard after recent pipework modification nearby.
root_cause: Thermal growth differential between pump and motor not compensated for during initial cold alignment.
action_taken: Corrected motor soft foot using stainless shims, adjusted piping hangers to relieve pipe strain, and realigned shafts.
parts_used: Coupling Element, Shim Kit 2x2

symptom_description: Main distribution panel tripped incoming feeder phase-to-ground fault protection. Strong distinct smell of ionized electrical arc and smoke inside cabinet.
root_cause: Aging and thermal embrittlement of red Glastic/GPO-3 busbar support insulators caused micro-cracks that tracked under high voltage stress.
action_taken: Isolated main feed, cleaned soot and carbon tracking from panel interior using dielectric solvent, replaced all 6 Glastic busbar support standoff insulators, and performed 1000V Megger test (`reading > 500 Mega-ohms`).
parts_used: Glastic/GPO-3 Busbar Standoff Insulators (6-Pack), Dielectric Solvent Cleaner (3 Cans), Polycarbonate Phase Barriers (Set of 3)

symptom_description: Power factor / Tan-Delta test on transformer windings increased to `1.8%` (`normal < 0.5%`). Furan analysis indicates severe Kraft paper insulation aging (`DP < 250`).
root_cause: Long-term thermal degradation and chemical depolymerization of Kraft paper winding insulation caused by operating at sustained high load temperatures (`> 90°C`).
action_taken: Scheduled emergency outage, connected mobile vacuum oil purification/dehydration rig, circulated and dried oil to `< 8 ppm` moisture, and added metal passivator chemical.
parts_used: Silica Gel Desiccant Beads (15 lbs), Oil Filter Cores, Gasket Set

symptom_description: Stator RTD temperature alarm active. Motor drawing `72` Amps (`98%` FLA) with significant thermal buildup on frame. Inspected power and control interconnects running to PUMP-102 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit for low-speed VFD operation and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Gradual degradation in discharge flow (`noticeable` reduction). Casing inspection revealed intermittent internal turbulence and cavitation crackling.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates over extended runtime.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller and casing wear rings.
parts_used: Duplex Stainless Impeller, Wear Ring Kit

symptom_description: Power factor / Tan-Delta test on transformer windings increased to `1.8%` (`normal < 0.5%`). Furan analysis indicates severe Kraft paper insulation aging (`DP < 250`).
root_cause: Long-term thermal degradation and chemical depolymerization of Kraft paper winding insulation caused by operating at sustained high load temperatures (`> 90°C`).
action_taken: De-energized transformer, performed comprehensive electrical testing (TTR, Winding Resistance, Sweep Frequency Response Analysis), dried oil via vacuum rig, and added antioxidant additives.
parts_used: Fuller's Earth Filter Cartridges (Set of 6), Silica Gel Breather Desiccant Charge (10 lbs), Oil Passivator Additive (1 Gal)

symptom_description: Transformer emitting high buzzing/crackling sound inside tank (`0.51` in/sec RMS on shell). Ultrasonic acoustic survey detected partial discharge near HV winding. Unit overdrawing current when PANEL-402 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Transient overvoltages from switching surges and lightning strikes caused micro-perforations and partial discharge inside inter-turn paper insulation.
action_taken: Scheduled emergency outage, connected mobile vacuum oil purification/dehydration rig, circulated and dried oil to `< 8 ppm` moisture, and added metal passivator chemical.
parts_used: Fuller's Earth Filter Cartridges (Set of 6), Silica Gel Breather Desiccant Charge (10 lbs), Oil Passivator Additive (1 Gal)

symptom_description: Voltage imbalance of `noticeable` across panel busbars under heavy load. Noticeable smell of heated ozone/insulation near panel vents.
root_cause: Improper initial torque application during installation (`bolts tightened without calibrated torque wrench or Belleville spring washers`).
action_taken: Cleaned arced busbar contact surfaces, installed new silver-plated copper splice plates and high-tensile hardware with Belleville washers, and verified micro-ohm contact resistance (`< 15 micro-ohms`).
parts_used: Replacement Terminal Lugs 500 MCM, Hardware & Washer Kit, Electrical Contact Cleaner

symptom_description: Chiller circuit A short cycling on low-pressure switch (`cutout at 26 PSI`). Clear sight glass showing continuous rapid bubbles.
root_cause: Loose flare nut connection on sight glass or filter drier fitting allowing slow loss of R-410A/R-407C over past cooling season.
action_taken: Performed electronic leak check, located micro-leak at condenser coil U-bend, recovered remaining charge, silver brazed repair, evacuated to 350 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-410A.
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Seal Caps (4-Pack), R-410A Refrigerant (18 lbs), Flare Gasket Set

symptom_description: Infrared (`IR`) thermography inspection revealed severe hotspot (`92`°C, `delta-T > 45°C above ambient`) on Phase B main busbar lug termination. Unit overdrawing current when XFMR-401 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Improper initial torque application during installation (`bolts tightened without calibrated torque wrench or Belleville spring washers`).
action_taken: De-energized main panel, performed complete torquing check across all main bus connections and feeder breaker terminals using calibrated torque wrench, and applied anti-oxidation paste.
parts_used: Replacement Terminal Lugs 500 MCM, Hardware & Washer Kit, Electrical Contact Cleaner

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight of scale deposits.
root_cause: Failure of chemical scale inhibitor/dispersant dosing pump allowed calcium carbonate hardness to exceed saturation index.
action_taken: Circulated bio-dispersant and mild descaling agent through tower loop for 12 hours, flushed cold water basin, and serviced bleed-off solenoid.
parts_used: Distribution Nozzle Replacement Set (20-Pack), Conductivity Controller Probe, Chemical Pump Peristaltic Tubing

symptom_description: Electronic expansion valve (`EEV`) at `100%` open position but evaporator temperature remaining severe elevated above setpoint.
root_cause: Micro-leak at copper U-bend braze joint on air-cooled condenser coil due to continuous fan vibration and thermal cycling.
action_taken: Repaired leaking braze joint on liquid line header, installed new hermetic filter drier, pulled vacuum, and charged unit with 22 lbs of R-410A.
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Seal Caps (4-Pack), R-410A Refrigerant (18 lbs), Flare Gasket Set

symptom_description: Loud gradual screeching, grinding, and cavitation crackling sound emanating from carry-side troughing idler roller near Station 14. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on MOTOR-601.
root_cause: Material spillage burying return idlers completely, preventing rotation and causing bearings to overheat and lock up.
action_taken: Locked out conveyor, removed 6 seized and noisy troughing idler assemblies along carry span, and installed new sealed-for-life CEMA C heavy-duty idler rollers.
parts_used: CEMA C Troughing Idler Rollers 35-Degree (Set of 6), Return Idler Rollers 4-inch (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Drive belts show persistent side wear, fraying cords, and glazing across pulley contact surfaces. Tension significantly degraded.
root_cause: Improper initial belt tensioning (`too loose`) allowed slippage and frictional glazing during high torque starts.
action_taken: Cleaned oil mist off sheave grooves using solvent, installed new matched V-belt set, and adjusted motor slide base tension.
parts_used: Heavy Duty V-Belt Set (3-Pack), Solvent Cleaner (1 Can)

symptom_description: Megger insulation resistance check across panel busbars to ground measured `0.05 Mega-ohms` (`critical hazard threshold`).
root_cause: Accumulation of conductive industrial dust, carbon soot, and high ambient moisture across busbar standoff insulators formed a tracking path to ground.
action_taken: Replaced cracked standoff insulators, re-torqued bus supports, thoroughly vacuumed and solvent cleaned panel cabinet, and installed rodent screens on all cabinet ventilation louvers.
parts_used: Glastic/GPO-3 Busbar Standoff Insulators (6-Pack), Dielectric Solvent Cleaner (3 Cans), Polycarbonate Phase Barriers (Set of 3)

symptom_description: Purge unit running excessively (`> 45 minutes per hour` exhausting non-condensables). Tech noted excessive oil film near rupture disc flange.
root_cause: Leaking shaft seal on open-drive centrifugal compressor assembly caused by drying out of seal face carbon during extended winter shutdown.
action_taken: Replaced degraded compressor suction elbow O-ring seal and rupture disc assembly, pulled 24-hour deep vacuum test, and charged unit with 120 lbs of R-134a.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)

symptom_description: Misalignment alignment switch alarm tripped, shutting down conveyor drive. Belt tracking edge frayed (`minor` wear) near head pulley area.
root_cause: Structural misalignment or frame skewing caused by forklift impact against conveyor side support legs.
action_taken: Scraped caked debris from drive and tail pulleys, adjusted gravity take-up counterweight guides, realigned troughing idler brackets, and verified straight tracking across all zones.
parts_used: Training Idler Set, Idler Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Loud excessive screeching, grinding, and cavitation crackling sound emanating from carry-side troughing idler roller near Station 14. Ops reported load fluctuations on MOTOR-601 coinciding with this fault.
root_cause: Material spillage burying return idlers completely, preventing rotation and causing bearings to overheat and lock up.
action_taken: Replaced 4 seized return idlers and 2 impact bed idlers under transfer point, cleared spilled material from under structure, and verified smooth, quiet rotation.
parts_used: CEMA C Troughing Idler Rollers 35-Degree (Set of 6), Return Idler Rollers 4-inch (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Loud persistent squealing and clicking sound from compressor drive belt guard during startup and loading cycles.
root_cause: Oil mist drip from minor shaft seal leak contaminated V-belt rubber, causing softening and loss of grip.
action_taken: Cleaned oil mist off sheave grooves using solvent, installed new matched V-belt set, and adjusted motor slide base tension.
parts_used: Replacement Drive Belt Kit, Sheave Lock Bushings
